findings.independent_review_result: BLOCK: executable cache schema/artifact contract incompatible with CacheAuthority; decision-time FamilyInput cache absent
findings.root_cause: The cache builder trusts caller-constructed FamilyInput values and copied authority metadata instead of deriving and reconciling frames from physically verified production sources.
subfindings: physically verify exact source manifests, bytes, schemas, units, interval and protected partition
derive and reconcile all 187 symbols, lifecycle/PIT eligibility and lagged liquidity
derive every required decision/fold and fold-local threshold population
derive exact Stage19 funding rows and Stage20 KDA02B inputs
define canonical sort, duplicate, gap, missingness and row identity
use semantic cache keys and complete invalidation inputs
build atomically/resumably twice with byte-identical manifests and equivalent contents
independently recompute sampled and boundary rows
reject payoff/future-return/ranking columns before construction
tests: 45 focused tests pass, but no production cache artifact can traverse CacheAuthority/CampaignOrchestrator
findings.title: authority-derived cache construction

findings.independent_review_result: BLOCK: missing-parent A2 payload crashes beam freeze; actual aggregate/materialized equality is not enforced
findings.root_cause: The orchestrator ignores selection_role, overlap deduplication and paired A2 eligibility, and infers materialization classes from lane names instead of frozen roles.
subfindings: enforce selection_role before plateau/beam selection
apply frozen development-event Jaccard deduplication
resolve A2 exact family/fold/beam slot, parent, counterpart, side, component set and exposure action atomically
persist unavailable_no_parent without reassignment
require paired A2 uplift and main-null contract
exclude context-bearing legacy anchors from main beams except typed corroboration
materialize survivors, anchors, main component nulls, control/forensic objects, frozen near-misses and deterministic failed strata exactly once
prove aggregate/materialized equality for the complete materialization set
tests: selection-role, A2 pairing and synthetic materialization helpers pass; actual production path remains unexercised
findings.title: selection, A2 binding and materialization

findings.independent_review_result: BLOCK: deterministic controls dispatch zero frames; randomized transformed-vector/restart replay incomplete
findings.root_cause: Random controls use implementation-specific payload hashes rather than the registered canonical seed, and duplicate/parent-identical controls are dispatched as evidence.
subfindings: bind canonical control identity to campaign/control/family/fold/parent-slot/replicate/version/seed fields
derive first unsigned big-endian 64 bits of SHA256 over canonical UTF-8 JSON
use numpy Generator PCG64 with the declared effective seed
use control address in matched allocation
persist missing parent as unavailable without reassignment
execute duplicate economic addresses once and retain multiplicity as unavailable_duplicate_address
separate V2 lineage from executable identity
prove worker/chunk/restart invariant replay
skip absent-parent conditional controls unless the typed family-level null requires execution
tests: seed/identity/duplicate focused tests pass; all 20 actual transformed control paths and replay invariance are not proven
findings.title: control seeds, identities and duplicates

findings.independent_review_result: BLOCK: explicit active-A1 temporal_gap state and required transition/property replay remain absent
findings.root_cause: Temporal inputs are only monotonic, rolling formulas can bridge missing intervals, nonfinite thresholds pass, and A1 symmetric rearm releases both sides from either-side q50 recovery.
subfindings: enforce chronological daily and five-minute inputs and exact contiguous coverage
never bridge gaps in returns, impulse, base, confirmation, retest, ATR or exits
invalidate active A1 episodes locally as temporal_gap and enter history_rebuild
rearm only after complete contiguous history and owning-side strict-below-q50 recovery
require both sides strict-below-q50 when no owner exists
do not rearm/trigger at the history-restoration timestamp
use exchange timestamps for durations and keep gaps symbol/address local
reject every nonfinite threshold population
cover all state transitions, sides, q50 equality, cooldown restart and chunk replay
tests: focused contiguous-window/q50 tests pass; full A1 state-transition mutation/property coverage does not exist
findings.title: temporal gaps and A1 rearm

findings.root_cause: Large results can deadlock a Pipe, health can complete before required release gates, detach is metadata-only, and local input unavailability is retried as a worker failure.
subfindings: persist production-sized worker results atomically or drain bounded IPC concurrently with explicit schema/acknowledgement
bounded lazy scheduling, graceful signals, orphan prevention and uncommitted-only requeue
idempotent restart validates commit, packet, cache and generation
persist service/session/PIDs/root/hashes/generation/counts/marker/resources/heartbeat/retries/stop reason
health release requires active service, accepting work, one reconciled real unit, first scheduled heartbeat and round-trip state
watchdog fails heartbeat age over 65 minutes and no-progress uses committed generations/markers
test actual systemd-user or reviewed tmux detachment after launcher shell exits
route observation-local EngineInputError to explicit unavailable artifacts without stopping other families
tests: large IPC, recovery, health and detached special-canary tests pass; actual production unattended launch path is not proven
findings.title: IPC, health release and detached supervision

findings.independent_review_result: BLOCK: timed workload is trivial marker lambdas and lacks required production metrics/strata execution
findings.root_cause: The V04 benchmark uses twenty one-frame synthetic jobs and a scalar multiplier rather than the full authorized source/cache/187-symbol/fold/conditional/terminal workload.
subfindings: benchmark all five families and eight fold positions
cover small/median/large symbols, every feature signature, exit/accounting class and all controls
cover aggregate/materialized, cold/warm cache and restart/reuse
enforce complete ExecutionAuthorization and outcome firewall
measure CPU/wall/RSS/read-write/cache/output/marker/event/scaling/storage metrics
model exact attempts, refinements, beams, outer folds, controls, forensics, materialization and persistence
construct conservative interval with explicit assumptions and at least 2x safety factor
feed measured safe capacity into optimizer without changing frozen counts unless infeasible
tests: resource projection helper completes; it does not measure production cache/engine/control/materialization work
findings.title: representative capacity benchmark

findings.independent_review_result: BLOCK: completion permits empty forensics, route/control coverage is incomplete, independent replay absent, terminal inventory becomes stale
findings.root_cause: Campaign completion is count-only; it does not execute registered route gates, forensics, terminal status enumeration or complete marker/artifact reconciliation.
subfindings: terminate every attempt/control in exactly one registered terminal status
reconcile attempt/control/family/fold/phase identities and multiplicity
execute frozen common, main-null, component, stress, delay, sample and paired-A2 route gates
produce concentration, leave-one-symbol/month, execution, funding, neighborhood and control forensics
independently recompute candidate, outer, control, route and multiplicity artifacts
support resumable incomplete and completed terminal packages
verify worker/process shutdown and terminal artifact/source hashes
prohibit completion until all terminal predicates and full expected-job/marker/artifact inventories pass
tests: terminal identity and resumable-bound-stop helpers pass; full registered terminal path and independent recomputation are not proven
findings.title: terminal adjudication, forensics and reconciliation
